solutions.title: Build Own & Operate
solutions.shortDescription: We design, own, operate your laundry — effortless setup, zero investment, predictable efficiency.
solutions.description: Our Build Own & Operate (BOO) model lets hotels, hospitals, and institutions run on-premise laundries without capital investment. Quick Clean designs, funds, installs, and operates the entire facility — staffing, chemicals, maintenance, and compliance included — with performance-linked SLAs.
features: Zero capex — we invest in equipment and infrastructure
End-to-end operations including staffing and consumables
Scalable capacity as your linen volumes grow

blog.title: Reducing Water Consumption in High-Volume Commercial Laundries
blog.excerpt: How modern washer-extractors and process optimisation cut water use from 24 L/kg to under 8 L/kg without compromising hygiene standards.
blog.content:
Commercial laundries are among the most water-intensive operations in hospitality and healthcare. Traditional processes consume up to 24 litres per kilogram of linen processed — a figure that strains both budgets and environmental commitments.

At QuickClean, we have demonstrated that systematic equipment upgrades, water recovery systems, and operator training can reduce consumption to under 8 L/kg — a 67% reduction that translates to millions of litres saved annually across our network.

Key strategies include high-efficiency washer-extractors with precise chemical dosing, heat recovery from exhaust air, greywater recycling for pre-wash cycles, and real-time monitoring dashboards that flag anomalies before they become waste.

For facility managers evaluating sustainability investments, the ROI on water efficiency typically materialises within 18–24 months through reduced utility bills and compliance with increasingly stringent environmental reporting requirements.

blog.title: Hospital Linen Hygiene: Meeting NABH and International Accreditation Requirements
blog.excerpt: A practical guide to designing on-premise hospital laundries that satisfy infection control protocols and audit requirements.
blog.content:
Hospital linen management sits at the intersection of patient safety, operational efficiency, and regulatory compliance. NABH accreditation and international standards such as HTM 01-04 place specific demands on laundry design, process validation, and documentation.

Critical design elements include clear separation of soiled and clean zones, negative pressure in sorting areas, validated wash cycles with thermal and chemical disinfection parameters, and traceability systems that link each batch to temperature and chemical logs.

QuickClean's healthcare laundry specialists work with infection control teams from the planning stage through commissioning audits, ensuring that facilities are audit-ready from day one.

blog.title: Why Five-Star Hotels Are Adopting the BOO Model for On-Premise Laundries
blog.excerpt: Capital efficiency, operational expertise, and SLA-backed performance are driving a shift from owned laundries to managed partnerships.
blog.content:
The Build Own & Operate model is reshaping how premium hospitality groups approach on-premise laundry. Rather than allocating capital to equipment that depreciates and requires specialised maintenance, hotel groups are partnering with operators who assume full lifecycle responsibility.

Benefits include zero upfront investment, predictable per-kg costing, guaranteed uptime SLAs, and access to continuous technology upgrades without additional capex. For CFOs and asset managers, BOO converts a fixed asset into a variable operating expense aligned with occupancy levels.

QuickClean currently operates BOO facilities for leading hotel groups across India, with average uptime exceeding 98% and water consumption consistently below industry benchmarks.

blog.title: Linen Hygiene Best Practices for Multi-Property Operations
blog.excerpt: Standardising linen handling protocols across properties ensures consistent guest experience and audit readiness.
blog.content:
Multi-property hospitality groups face a unique challenge: maintaining uniform linen hygiene standards across diverse facilities, staff teams, and equipment configurations. Without centralised protocols, quality variance becomes a brand risk.

QuickClean recommends a three-tier approach: standardised SOPs with visual job aids, centralised chemical and wash programme management, and quarterly hygiene audits with scored dashboards shared across properties.

Technology plays a growing role — IoT-enabled washers that log cycle parameters, RFID linen tracking, and cloud-based compliance reporting give regional managers real-time visibility without visiting every site.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Quick Clean Laundry Systems Pvt. Ltd. has been India's trusted partner for on-premise commercial laundry since 2010. Headquartered in Gurugram, we serve hospitality, healthcare, defence, and institutional clients across 38+ cities with 1,500+ skilled employees managing 110+ on-premise laundry sites.
about.mission: To deliver reliable, sustainable, and cost-effective commercial laundry solutions that let our partners focus on their core business.
about.vision: To be the most trusted commercial laundry partner in South Asia and emerging international markets.

reweave360.heroSubtitle: India's first circular linen economy programme — transforming textile waste into measurable sustainability impact.
wakeUpParagraphs: Every day, clean linen is laid out for guests. Every day, more used linen is discarded — stained, torn, or outdated. But what happens after disposal? It ends up in landfills.
The world generates 91.8 million tonnes of textile waste annually. India contributes 7.8 million tonnes — nearly 20% of which ends up in landfills, releasing harmful emissions.
In hospitality and healthcare, where linen turnover is high, the opportunity — and the responsibility — to act is even greater. It's time to stop throwing value away.
reweave360.programDescription: ReWeave 360 is India's first circular linen economy programme. We build a smarter, sustainable system where discarded linen doesn't end in landfills but re-enters the value chain through innovation, partnerships, and verified recycling networks.

steps.title: Collect
steps.description: We pick up used or damaged linen from your property on scheduled cycles.

steps.title: Recycle
steps.description: Certified partners process textiles responsibly through verified recycling networks.

steps.title: Recreate
steps.description: Fabric is reborn into useful products — from aprons to cleaning cloths and laundry bags.

steps.title: Report
steps.description: You receive measurable ESG data and impact reports for sustainability disclosures.

benefits.title: Get measurable ESG metrics for annual reports
Strengthen brand reputation with guests and stakeholders
Align with UN SDG 12: Responsible Consumption & Production

reweave360.wasteToWorthDescription: Imagine turning worn-out bedsheets into soft pool towels, or old uniforms into new cleaning cloths and aprons. That's what ReWeave 360 does — transforming textile waste into useful products that continue to deliver value.
reweave360.getStartedDescription: Getting started is simple — and free. We'll guide you through every step, from linen collection to impact tracking.

financialPlanning.title: Financial Planning
financialPlanning.intro: Strategic financial guidance for hospitality and healthcare groups evaluating commercial laundry investments, BOO partnerships, and total cost of ownership models.

sections.title: Total Cost of Ownership Analysis
sections.content: We provide detailed TCO models comparing owned vs. operated laundry facilities, factoring in equipment depreciation, staffing, utilities, chemicals, maintenance, and opportunity cost of capital over 5, 10, and 15-year horizons.

sections.title: BOO Financial Structuring
sections.content: Our finance team works with your CFO and treasury functions to structure Build Own & Operate agreements that optimise balance sheet treatment, tax efficiency, and cash flow predictability.

sections.title: Capex vs. Opex Modelling
sections.content: For groups evaluating turnkey installations versus managed operations, we deliver scenario analyses with sensitivity modelling for occupancy fluctuations, linen volume growth, and utility price changes.

sections.title: Sustainability ROI
sections.content: Quantify the financial returns on water and energy efficiency investments, including carbon credit potential, ESG reporting value, and compliance cost avoidance.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly, including name, email, phone number, company name, and messages submitted through our contact and newsletter forms. We also collect standard web analytics data including IP address, browser type, and pages visited.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use collected information to respond to enquiries, send requested communications, improve our website and services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.body: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal information against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information by contacting us at hello@quickclean.co.in.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use this website.

sections.heading: Use of Website

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: QuickClean shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of this website or reliance on its content.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Gurugram, Haryana.

sections.heading: Our Commitment
sections.body: QuickClean is committed to conducting business with integrity, transparency, and respect for all stakeholders including employees, clients, suppliers, and communities.

sections.heading: Ethical Business Practices
sections.body: We prohibit bribery, corruption, and unfair competition. All employees and partners are expected to comply with applicable laws and regulations.

sections.heading: Workplace Standards
sections.body: We maintain safe working conditions, fair compensation, and equal opportunity across all operations. Harassment and discrimination are not tolerated.

sections.heading: Environmental Responsibility
sections.body: We strive to minimise environmental impact through water efficiency, energy conservation, and circular economy initiatives including ReWeave 360.
